items.title: Elevate upcoming outdoor gatherings with Govee’s 96 or 144-foot S14 Matter Outdoor String Lights 2 starting from $80
items.summary:
Through its official Amazon storefront, Govee is offering its 96-foot S14 Bulb Outdoor String Lights 2 with Matter at $79.98 shipped, while the 144-foot model is down at $109.98 shipped, with both options matching the price we’re seeing from the direct website. These two sizes of smart outdoor lights normally go for $120 and $160 at full price, with both models only going as low as today’s rates in 2026. While the $50 markdown on the 144-foot model is landing it back at an all-time low, the $40 markdown on the 96-foot model is landing it at the best price of 2026 and the third-lowest overall price – just $10 above the all-time low.

more…

items.title: Get 3,000 PSI of pro-tier cleaning power with this Greenworks electric pressure washer at $360 (Reg. $500)
items.summary:
Over at Amazon, you can bolster your outdoor cleaning needs with the Greenworks Pro Brushless 3000 PSI Electric Pressure Washer for $359.99 shipped, beating out its direct website pricing by $140. It’s dropping down from a $500 full price here, which we’ve previously seen only go as low as $370 in 2026. While the price has gone a bit further in the past, you’re looking at a 28% markdown off the going rate, slashing $140 from the tag to land it at the best price we have tracked since early November.

more…

items.title: Baseus’ X1 Pro wireless outdoor dual-tracking solar security camera drops back to $150 low
items.summary:
At Amazon, through the official Woot storefront, you can currently score the Baseus X1 Pro Wireless Outdoor Dual-Tracking Solar Security Camera at $149.99 shipped. While it may carry a $270 MSRP, it’s been keeping down from that full rate since March, keeping between $170 and $160 on average, though there have been some occasional drops as low as $150. Today’s deal is one such drop, giving you a total $120 savings over buying it at full price, and returning it to the all-time lowest price we have tracked.

more…
